jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Zydus Lifesciences
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
